creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Please close this PR, I have filed another PR about upgrading to 1.0.2.

On Thu, Jun 21, 2007 at 05:10:04AM +0000, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/113898'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
>

> via this link:
